name: research-writing-workspace
title: Research & Writing
description: Research & writing workspace foundation: install-graph descriptor for the sources, notes, citations, briefs, documents, outlines, and knowledge-work workspace.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/research-writing-workspace",
  "workspace": "research-writing",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.registry-foundation",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "button",
    "panel",
    "text-field",
    "data-list",
    "agent-panel",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "research-writing-app",
    "research-writing-sources-page",
    "research-writing-brief-page",
    "research-writing-sources-block",
    "research-writing-citations-block",
    "research-writing-outline-block",
    "research-writing-agent-review-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "research-writing-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "button",
      "panel",
      "text-field",
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "research-writing-app",
      "research-writing-sources-page",
      "research-writing-brief-page",
      "research-writing-sources-block",
      "research-writing-citations-block",
      "research-writing-outline-block",
      "research-writing-agent-review-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "sources",
    "notes",
    "citations",
    "briefs",
    "documents",
    "outlines",
    "knowledge"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-09.workspace-shell",
    "title": "Research / Writing",
    "summary": "A research and writing shell for sources, notes, citations, briefs, documents, outlines, and knowledge workflows.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.research-writing.shell",
      "layout": "document-workbench",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Sources",
          "route": "/research-writing/sources"
        },
        {
          "label": "Notes",
          "route": "/research-writing/notes"
        },
        {
          "label": "Brief",
          "route": "/research-writing/brief"
        },
        {
          "label": "Outline",
          "route": "/research-writing/outline"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/research-writing/sources",
        "page": "page.research-writing.sources",
        "title": "Sources and citations",
        "blocks": [
          "block.research-writing.sources",
          "block.research-writing.citations"
        ]
      },
      {
        "path": "/research-writing/brief",
        "page": "page.research-writing.brief",
        "title": "Brief drafting",
        "blocks": [
          "block.research-writing.outline",
          "block.research-writing.agent-review"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.research-writing.sources",
        "title": "Sources and citations",
        "description": "Source display, citation lists, redaction-aware references, and long document titles.",
        "components": [
          "docs-source-panel",
          "data-list",
          "panel"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "page.research-writing.brief",
        "title": "Brief drafting",
        "description": "Outline, notes, document state, and display-only writing-agent review.",
        "components": [
          "docs-source-panel",
          "text-field",
          "agent-panel",
          "button"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.research-writing.sources",
        "title": "Sources",
        "component": "docs-source-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.research-writing.citations",
        "title": "Citations",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "empty"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.research-writing.outline",
        "title": "Outline",
        "component": "text-field",
        "stateExamples": [
          "invalid"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.research-writing.agent-review",
        "title": "Writing review",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "error"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "componentParts": [
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "data-list",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "panel",
      "text-field"
    ],
    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "Long source names, citation strings, and outline sections wrap inside the writing shell.",
      "empty": "No citations selected is displayed as an empty table/list state.",
      "error": "Review-agent errors are presented as inert status without executing actions."
    },
    "provenance": {
      "source": "registry/workspaces/research-writing/workspace-shell.json",
      "copiedSource": false
    }
  },
  "implementation": {
    "status": "mounted-react-workspace-implementation",
    "runtimeReactApp": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "source": "packages/ui/src/workspaces.mjs",
    "app": "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/research-writing-app.implementation.json",
    "pages": [
      "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/pages/research-writing-sources-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/pages/research-writing-brief-page.page.implementation.json"
    ],
    "blocks": [
      "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/blocks/research-writing-sources-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/blocks/research-writing-citations-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/blocks/research-writing-outline-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/research-writing/blocks/research-writing-agent-review-block.block.implementation.json"
    ]
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Workspace shell installs generated route/page/block/component descriptors from authored source; full React app implementation remains pending.
